input_dict.question: Brooklyn Nine-Nine had a supporting cast that included which comedian and writer?
input_dict.source_summary: Chelsea Peretti is part of the Brooklyn Nine-Nine supporting cast and is an American comedian and writer.
input_dict.target_summary: The Brooklyn Nine-Nine page lists Chelsea Peretti as part of the ensemble and supporting cast, portraying Regina "Gina" Linetti. The Chelsea Peretti page states she is an American comedian, actress, and writer. These two facts link a Brooklyn Nine-Nine supporting cast member to being a comedian and writer.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Chelsea Peretti is listed in the Brooklyn Nine-Nine ensemble and supporting cast as Regina "Gina" Linetti. She is an American comedian and writer.
